svg.title: tigrbl SSOT registry graph
svg.desc: Lightweight SVG view generated from SSOT graph JSON with 3560 nodes and 14555 edges.
svg.text: Top edge types: COVERED_BY: 3308, DECIDED_BY: 2168, VERIFIES: 1804, DERIVES_FROM: 1741, SUPPORTS: 1077, SPECIFIED_BY: 942, ASSERTS: 910, SCOPES: 691
Rendered all 3560 nodes; direct edge overlay is capped for browser usability, with full edge counts summarized above. DOT source is beside this SVG.
